strategy: Hit with Storm (+35%), avoid Myth (35% resist).

Blades, globals, traps (including Feint), and shields all make him Hex (+35%) the caster, so every normal buff puts a damage-trap on you. Buff with Auras and pet-cast spells instead, which do not trigger the Hex.
At only 3,590 health you do not need much setup, an Aura plus one Storm hit ends it.
If you must blade, accept that each Hex is only on you, and hit before it matters or cleanse it.
Open with an aura, then land a single big Storm attack.
cheatNotes: Cast a blade and he interrupt-Hexes (+35%) you, buff with auras or pets instead.
Globals also trigger the Hex, but Auras do NOT, use auras to buff safely.
Pet-cast spells do not trigger the Hex either.
Cast a trap (Feint included) or a shield and he Hexes you the same way.
The cheat text only shows up after he casts the Hex, so expect it whenever you buff or trap.
